html:
Exclusive to:

“Used to mark a spot, and then used again to teleport to that spot.

8 minute cooldown. Even works between the Cave and the Forest.”

-

The Backtrek Watch gives Wanda the ability to set a waypoint in space, and teleport to that spot at any time. The Watch has an 8 minute (1 day) cooldown, and is able to transport the player between shards (meaning between Surface and Cave in normal game).

After the watch has been activated, the examination changes to "Is it time for us to take a dip in the timestream?" letting the player know whether or not a destination has already been set. Should the destination be set within a different shard (usually the Caves if you are within the Surface shard and vice versa), her examination will change to "It'll be a big jump, but I can make it!".

It requires 2 Time Pieces, 2 Gold Nuggets and a Walrus Tusk to craft.

Rift Watch

“Used to mark a spot, and then used again to open a portal to that spot that lasts for 10 seconds.

Using the portal costs 20 Sanity.

The Rift Watch will become a Backtrek Watch after use.”

-

The Rift Watch requires 1 Backtrek Watch and 1 Purple Gem to craft. It is an upgraded version of the Backtrek Watch, which allows other players to quickly travel to the waypoint as well. Upon use, it will open a portal to the waypoint area for 10 seconds, and any players can travel through the portal. Characters besides Wanda and Walter will lose 20 sanity as they jump into the portal. After use, the Rift Watch will transform back into a Backtrek Watch, losing the purple gem. The waypoint will be kept.

The watch can also be made by socketing 1 Purple Gem, similarly to how a purple Moonlens is made, potentially saving on time spent making more.

Time Rift (Enter)Time Rift (Exit)

Tips

  • If a watch is at an undesired location and you wish to replace the anchor point, using the Clockmaker's Tools and recrafting the watch will allow you to reset the destination.
  • Wanda can use the Rift Watch to carry Heavy Items like Chess Pieces easily, by creating the portal first, then picking up the objects and jumping into it. Backtrek Watch can not do the same though, as it can not be activated when Wanda is carrying Heavy Items.
  • Do not set an anchor point while on a boat. If the boat moves away, the anchor point will stay at the same place, causing anyone unfortunate enough to use the corresponding watch to immediately drown.

Gallery

  • Concept art from "Rhymes With Play" #282.
  • A simple method to record each pocket watch corresponding transmission position.
  • A joke animation with Wilson and portals from "Rhymes With Play" #282.
  • Watch Portals use concept animation from "Rhymes With Play" #282.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
Backtrek Watch
Idle
Cooldown
"Return to a distant point in time."
Object Info
Perk
Teleport a long distance.
Does not stack
8 min
Crafting
×2 ×2 ×1 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"pocketwatch_recall"
“I bet there's a lot of interesting science inside.”
–Wilson
“Why worry about the past or future? It'll all go up in flames eventually.”
–Willow
“Is just little clock.”
–Wolfgang
“It's soothing to watch the seconds tick away.”
–Wendy
“TIME MACHINE? TIME MACHINE!!”
–WX-78
“Horology mixed with magic, truly fascinating.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a pretty fancy lookin' clock.”
–Woodie
“Careful, madam. I know where this trail ultimately leads.”
–Maxwell
“A Viking warrior can tell the time by the position of the sun.”
–Wigfrid
“Would we change anything if we could go back in time?”
–Webber
“Maybe I could ask her to make me a kitchen timer...”
–Warly
“Tick tock tick tock”
–Wormwood
“I wouldn't mind takin' a look at its inner workings.”
–Winona
“Mortals keep coming up with such funny tricks!”
–Wortox
“Only chewed on it little bit! But Wandy-lady got mad...”
–Wurt
“Ms. Wanda sure has a lot of clocks!”
–Walter
“Ah, that takes me way back.”
–Wanda
“Used to mark a spot, and then used again to teleport to that spot.
8 minute cooldown. Even works between the Cave and the Forest.”
-
The Backtrek Watch gives Wanda the ability to set a waypoint in space, and teleport to that spot at any time. The Watch has an 8 minute (1 day) cooldown, and is able to transport the player between shards (meaning between Surface and Cave in normal game).

Should the destination be set within a different shard (usually the Caves if you are within the Surface shard and vice versa), her examination will change to "It'll be a big jump, but I can make it!".
It requires 2 Time Pieces, 2 Gold Nuggets and a Walrus Tusk to craft.

Using the portal costs 20 Sanity.
The Rift Watch will become a Backtrek Watch after use.”
-
The Rift Watch requires 1 Backtrek Watch and 1 Purple Gem to craft. It is an upgraded version of the Backtrek Watch, which allows other players to quickly travel to the waypoint as well. Upon use, it will open a portal to the waypoint area for 10 seconds, and any players can travel through the portal. Spawns From
Time Rift (Enter)Time Rift (Exit)
“Onward, to discovery!”
–Wilson
“Am I really just gonna jump into any old portal I see? Yep!”
–Willow
“Is very dark inside... maybe Wolfgang will just walk instead?”
–Wolfgang
“What will I find if I take a tumble down the rabbit hole?”
–Wendy
“I'LL LET ONE OF MY MINIONS TEST IT FIRST”
–WX-78
“Magic triggered by a clockwork mechanism, how fascinating!”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't know Lucy, that looks like a quick way to a bad time...”
–Woodie
“At least it doesn't smell, like some other modes of transportation.”
–Maxwell
“Charge!!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks a bit scary...”
–Webber
“Must I... really go in?”
–Warly
“Spinny hole”
–Wormwood
“I must be off my rocker to think about jumping into another portal...”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, we'll be sure to get there in a timely manner!”
–Wortox
“Weird tunnel.”
–Wurt
“Come on Woby, this is going to be fun!”
–Walter
“It won't stay open forever. Come along everyone, tick-tock!”
–Wanda
“It's a long drop down.”
–Wilson
“It's fun to watch OTHER people fall on their butts.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is happy to be out of tunnel.”
–Wolfgang
“I'm afraid the past is just as dreadful as the future.”
–Wendy
“I LIKE TO WATCH THE FLESHLINGS FALL”
–WX-78
“I wonder if she would allow me to write down my observations...”
–Wickerbottom
“Wish she'd put those over somethin' softer to land on.”
–Woodie
“Hmph. I think she puts it up there on purpose.”
–Maxwell
“Be it up sö high tö test öur landing pröwess?”
–Wigfrid
“That looks like a long fall.”
–Webber
“I wonder who might be coming through?”
–Warly
“Spinny sky hole”
–Wormwood
“Pretty sure putting it at that height is a safety violation.”
–Winona
“You can always count on the mortals to make things needlessly complicated.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, it too high to reach!”
–Wurt
“Time travel sure is amazing!”
–Walter
“Another flawless temporal excursion.”
–Wanda
Tips[edit | edit source]
If a watch is at an undesired location and you wish to replace the anchor point, using the Clockmaker's Tools and recrafting the watch will allow you to reset the destination.
Wanda can use the Rift Watch to carry Heavy Items like Chess Pieces easily, by creating the portal first, then picking up the objects and jumping into it. Backtrek Watch can not do the same though, as it can not be activated when Wanda is carrying Heavy Items.
Do not set an anchor point while on a boat. If the boat moves away, the anchor point will stay at the same place, causing anyone unfortunate enough to use the corresponding watch to immediately drown.
